events.name: VfB Stuttgart at 1. FC Union Berlin

headlines.description: Bundesliga top scorer Serhou Guirassy bagged a record-breaking 14th goal in Stuttgart's 3-0 victory over Union Berlin on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Guirassy sets record in Stuttgart win at Berlin

video.headline: Stuttgart stay second after dismantling Union Berlin

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play (FC Union Berlin vs. VfB Stuttgart - Game Highlights) 2023/10/21 ESHEET

headlines.description: Leverkusen battled to a 2-1 win over hosts VfL Wolfsburg on Saturday with goals from Frimpong and Grimaldo, to stay in top spot in the Bundesliga
headlines.shortLinkText: Leverkusen beat Wolfsburg to remain in top spot

video.headline: VfL Wolfsburg vs. Bayer Leverkusen - Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play (VfL Wolfsburg vs. Bayer Leverkusen - Game Highlights) 2023/10/21 ESHEET

headlines.description: Bayern Munich struck twice in five minutes through Coman and Kane to cruise past Mainz 05 3-1 on Saturday and move into third place in the Bundesliga.
headlines.shortLinkText: Kane scores in Bayern's 3-1 win over Mainz

video.headline: Harry Kane scores header vs. Mainz

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play (Harry Kane scores header vs. Mainz) 2023/10/21 ESHEET
